ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the line is situated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the line (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the production line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the production line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_lines_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line from which the metric was collected */,
  "loc_conf" REAL /* Location configuration value */,
  "p1" INTEGER /* Performance parameter 1 */,
  "p2" INTEGER /* Performance parameter 2 */,
  "p3" INTEGER /* Performance parameter 3 */,
  "p4" INTEGER /* Performance parameter 4 */,
  "p5" INTEGER /* Performance parameter 5 */,
  "p6" INTEGER /* Performance parameter 6 */,
  "actual" INTEGER /* Actual output value */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target output value */,
  "collected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was collected */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is valid (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance issue, operational issue) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the alert */,
  "is_acknowledged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been acknowledged (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shift_logs" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift log */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line associated with the shift */,
  "shift_date" TEXT /* Date of the shift */,
  "shift_start" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "shift_end" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "shift_supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor for the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shift_logs_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "efficiency_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "efficiency_score" REAL /* Calculated efficiency score for the production line */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the report */,
  "reporting_manager" TEXT /* Name of the manager who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efficiency_reports_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string to access the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is valid (true/false) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for the prediction */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted values generated by the model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)
